claims: The skill is described as specifically for "gcs lifecycle policy operations," yet it requests permission to run any `gcloud` command via `Bash(gcloud:*)`. This includes access to all Google Cloud services (Compute Engine, BigQuery, Vertex AI, etc.) and administrative operations far beyond lifecycle policy management, creating excessive privilege escalation risk for a narrowly-defined storage management task.
